---
title: "Experience"
format: html
---

## 💼 Experience

<br>

<div class="card">

### **Lam An LLC – Administrative & Data Support Assistant**  
*Binh Duong, Vietnam | Dec 2023 – Aug 2024*

- Managed scheduling, travel coordination, and administrative operations for 5 supply chain managers, improving team efficiency and communication workflows  
- Handled ~100 daily inquiries across multiple channels, ensuring timely communication and information flow  
- Analyzed usage trends for top 20 printing materials to support procurement and inventory planning  
- Prepared reports and meeting materials, translating operational data into actionable insights  

</div>

<div class="card">

### **Hang Thuan LLC – Market Analysis Associate**  
*Binh Duong, Vietnam | Oct 2021 – Aug 2022*

- Developed pricing and sales strategies, contributing to the launch of 5+ product lines annually  
- Managed B2B client relationships and sales processes, closing 10 deals during a challenging market period  
- Monitored inventory and submitted weekly procurement orders to maintain supply continuity  
- Analyzed customer demand and market trends to support product positioning  

</div>

---

<br>

## 📊 Projects

<br>

<div class="card">

### **Northwind Traders Sales & Customer Analytics**  
*Boston, MA | Aug 2025 – Dec 2025*  
**Tools:** Python, SQL

- Analyzed 1,500+ transactions across customers, employees, and product categories  
- Evaluated revenue trends, sales performance, and customer behavior  
- Built dashboards and visualizations to identify key business drivers  
- Delivered insights to support data-driven sales strategy  

</div>

<div class="card">

### **Salary & Compensation Trends Analysis — U.S. Job Market**  
*Boston, MA | Mar 2025 – May 2025*  
**Tools:** Python, AWS EC2, SQL, GitHub

- Analyzed 71,000+ job records to identify compensation trends across industries  
- Built a cloud-based analytics workflow using AWS EC2  
- Conducted EDA on salary patterns, remote work, and geographic trends  
- Developed models for salary benchmarking and forecasting  

</div>

<div class="card">

### **Housing Market Analysis — Queens, New York**  
*Boston, MA | Oct 2024 – Dec 2024*  
**Tools:** R, Random Forest, Power BI

- Analyzed 2,500+ property records to evaluate pricing and demand trends  
- Built predictive models to estimate housing prices  
- Performed forecasting to assess short-term market trends  
- Delivered insights for pricing strategy and market segmentation  

</div>

<div class="card">

### **MBTA System Analysis — Reliability & Efficiency Optimization**  
*Boston, MA | Jan 2025 – Mar 2025*

- Analyzed operational data from 50 bus routes to assess delays and reliability  
- Identified opportunities for 10% cost reduction and 15% efficiency improvement  
- Developed performance metrics and monitoring frameworks  
- Supported data-driven transit planning decisions  

</div>

<div class="card">

### **Investment Feasibility Analysis — Microbrewery**  
*Boston, MA | Aug 2024 – Nov 2024*

- Conducted financial analysis for a $150K investment  
- Modeled production capacity of 476K+ units annually  
- Built demand forecasts for 400K+ projected units  
- Delivered strategic recommendations based on profitability and growth  

</div>

---

<br>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">

<a href="cv.qmd" class="button btn-outline-primary">📄 View CV</a>  
<a href="contact.html" class="button btn-outline-primary">📬 Contact Me</a>  

</div>
